modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty creating channels in Microsoft Teams.

full_description_text:  
The user was on a call, trying to set up new channels in their Microsoft Team. They seemed a bit confused about the process. It’s important to have the right permissions, and sometimes the interface can be tricky. They mentioned wanting to organize their team better, but the steps weren’t clear to them at all.
short_description: Difficulty creating channels in Microsoft Teams.
